title: Lucky Block Resourcepack
description: The Ultimate Eternal Fortune Resource Pack!
body:
# 🌟 Eternal Fortune (Resource Pack)

This resource pack is the companion to the Eternal Fortune Datapack
, bringing a fully customized visual experience to Minecraft. While the datapack delivers the exciting mechanics, this pack provides the textures and models that complete the adventure.

## 📦 Features
 
Unique lucky block textures designed to match the datapack.

Lightweight, clean, and works seamlessly with vanilla and mods.

Pairs perfectly with Eternal Fortune gameplay for the full experience.

## ✅ Compatibility
Works with vanilla Minecraft (Java Edition).

Best experienced together with the Eternal Fortune Datapack
.

Compatible with Fabric, Quilt, and NeoForge setups.

## 🛠 Installation

Download the .zip file.

Place it into your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it under Options → Resource Packs.

## 💖 Support the Project

If you enjoy Eternal Fortune and want to support development:

 ☕ Buy me a coffee 

### [💬Join Our Discord](https://discord.gg/mHQx8nwEMA)


### ✨ Don’t forget to pair this resource pack with the [Eternal Fortune Datapack ](https://modrinth.com/datapack/eternalfortune) for the complete adventure!
